help.ota: To enable OTA, set the ota key to true
help.platform: set the platform key to ios
help.version: set the version key to the version you want to release
help.rollback: set the rollback key to true if you want to rollback to the previous version
help.rc_time: set the rc_time key to the time you want to wait for the release config timeout
help.pg_time: set the pg_time key to the time you want to wait for the package timeout
help.env: set the env key to the environment you want to release to , [sandbox, prod]
